notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes open battlefield events (常飚 vs 奚雪, 古国龙 vs 成龙, 罗伯军 deployment, three beast tamer attacks) which are all publicly visible combat actions. No private knowledge, secret plans, future-known information, or directly supported knowledge gaps are present. The only potentially non-obvious element is that 黑楼兰 receives support from 黑柏 and 黑城 (gu immortals), but this is stated as a known fact (一直得到...资助) rather than a hidden fact. No source supports any character knowing something others do not, or any future-known information. All events are ordinary visible battlefield occurrences.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: the seed package primarily describes battlefield deployments and combat events (常飚 vs 奚雪, 古国龙 vs 成龙, 罗伯军 deployment, 三位奴道大师 attack, 方源 revealing cultivation). No character's internal motive is directly observable from the seed facts. Observed actions (fighting, deploying troops, revealing cultivation) are visible but the underlying motives are ambiguous - e.g., 黑楼兰's impatience (ptr_17) could be frustration, tactical concern, or something else. 方源 revealing his cultivation could be for many reasons. Without direct source support for a specific motive, returning empty characterMotives per rules.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
黑家作为集体 faction 正在与马家交战，黑楼兰作为首领表现出不耐烦和压力，黑家有蛊仙资助但战场处于微弱优势而非压倒性胜利，马家派出三位奴道大师驱动兽群冲击黑家，形成明显的军事压力。source-backed.
IF export filter quarantined 6 legacy old-schema branches.
